ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., D, C) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's current team */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Preferred hand of the player (left, right) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  "is_injured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is currently injured */,
  "injury_details" TEXT /* Details about the player's current injury */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the player record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the player record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  "shootout" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into a shootout */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the game record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the game record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "pt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-team relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the player started playing for the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the player stopped playing for the team */,
  "is_current_team" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team is the player's current team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the player-team relationship record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the player-team relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, trainer, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_analysis" (
  "va_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video analysis */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the video analysis belongs to */,
  "video_file" TEXT /* File path to the video file */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time in the game when the video analysis was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the video analysis record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the video analysis record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("va_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_analysis_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_tags" (
  "vt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video tag */,
  "va_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video analysis the tag belongs to */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag for the video analysis (e.g., goal, penalty) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the video tag record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the video tag record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_tags_va_id FOREIGN KEY ("va_id") REFERENCES video_analysis ("va_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., game summary, player performance) */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is private */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_items" (
  "ri_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report item */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the item belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item (e.g., goals, assists) */,
  "item_value" TEXT /* Value of the item (e.g., 2, 3) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report item record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report item record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ri_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_items_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule item */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the schedule item belongs to */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game will be played */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the schedule item record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the schedule item record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedule_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedule_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
